mnemonics: Pumping Lemma Problems? Use PLUM: Pattern, Length, Unique, Must (repeat). For automata proofs: States Count, Transitions Trace, Acceptance Check.
keyPoints: Pumping Lemma is used to prove a language is NOT regular/context-free.
Understand the difference between Decidable, Recognizable, and Unrecognizable problems.
Reduction is a key technique to prove undecidability by transforming one problem to another.
commonMistakes: Assuming the Pumping Lemma can prove a language IS regular/context-free (it only proves the opposite).
Confusing the hierarchy of language classes (Regular ⊂ Context-Free ⊂ Decidable ⊂ Recognizable).
Incorrectly applying a reduction by not ensuring the transformation is computable and preserves the answer.
